query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.login_id, u.role, u.org_id, o.name as org_name, o.parent_org_id, o.org_type FROM users u LEFT JOIN organizations o ON u.org_id = o.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%大藏%' OR u.name LIKE '%大蔵%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XnG4b7Nz2zs3sV.root --database e2zSqZTPJkUs8xTu63WAYC --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.login_id, u.role, u.org_id, o.name as org_name, o.parent_org_id, o.org_type FROM users u LEFT JOIN organizations o ON u.org_id = o.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%大藏%' OR u.name LIKE '%大蔵%';
